layout.name: fireID
layout.title: Fire ID
layout.tooltip: The NPC ID of the fire shot by the NPC. If nil or 0, no fire will be shot.

layout.name: fireSpurts
layout.title: Fire Spurts
layout.tooltip: How many spurts of fire the NPC will shoot before retracting.

layout.name: firePerSpurt
layout.title: Fire Per Spurts
layout.tooltip: How many fire NPCs are shot in each spurt.

layout.name: fireSpurtDelay
layout.title: Fire Spurt Delay
layout.tooltip: How many frames of delay there are between each spurt.

layout.name: fireSpeed
layout.title: Fire Speed
layout.tooltip: The speed of each fire NPC shot by the NPC.

layout.name: fireAngle
layout.title: Fire Angle
layout.tooltip: The angle of each fire NPC shot by the NPC. Increases with each spurt.
